top.name: Overcharge
top.rules_text: Spend all charge (min 2). Deal 5 damage per charge spent to target. Lose 4 HP per charge spent.

bottom.name: Tome Bind
bottom.rules_text: Exile a card from your hand face up. Cast its top half for free once per turn while exiled.

upgrades.description: Overcharge recoils less. Tome Bind binds cheaper casts.

changes.value: Spend all charge (min 2). Deal 5 damage per charge to target. Lose 3 HP per charge.
Exile a card face up. Cast its top half for 1 less, once per turn, while exiled.
Spend all charge (min 2). Deal 6 damage per charge. Lose 3 HP per charge.

upgrades.description: Spellbook Bind: cast the bound half for free.

changes.value: Exile a card face up. Cast its top half for free once per turn while exiled.

upgrades.description: Controlled Burn: no self-damage on the first 3 charge spent.

changes.value: Spend all charge (min 2). Deal 6 per charge. Lose 3 HP per charge beyond the first 3.

upgrades.description: Grand Tome: cast either half of the bound card.

changes.value: Exile a card face up. Cast either half for free once per turn while exiled.

upgrades.description: Singularity Blast: splash the overcharge to all nearby enemies.

changes.value: Spend all charge (min 2). Deal 6 per charge to target. Deal 6 to all enemies within 2. No self-damage.

upgrades.description: The Living Library: bind two cards at once.

changes.value: Exile 2 cards face up. Cast either half of each for free once per turn while exiled.
